findings.evidence: Line 147 names the lemma `complex_smul_eq_re_smul_add_im_smul_I`; line 149 states `z.re • v + z.im • (Complex.I • v) = z • v`. Mathlib precedent: `Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Complex/Module.lean:415` has `realPart_add_I_smul_imaginaryPart (a) : (ℜ a : A) + I • (ℑ a : A) = a`.
findings.fix: Rename it to match the displayed conclusion, e.g. `re_smul_add_im_smul_I_eq_complex_smul`, or follow Mathlib's decomposition style with a non-`eq` name analogous to `realPart_add_I_smul_imaginaryPart`.
findings.issue: `complex_smul_eq_re_smul_add_im_smul_I` advertises `z • v = ...`, but the theorem statement is `z.re • v + z.im • (Complex.I • v) = z • v`.

summary: One exported theorem name reverses the equality it states; the rest of the introduced names and notation are consistent with the surrounding API.
